pi_items.source: Task description explicit instruction and export_result.sh SQL query target.
setup_task.sh injects line items totaling 2300.00; adding 50.00 shipping results in 2350.00.
setup_task.sh PHP script explicitly seeds a SalesOrder record with this subject.
setup_task.sh PHP script explicitly seeds an Accounts record with this accountname.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for vtiger_crm_env convert_sales_order_to_invoice task by confirming that the prerequisite Sales Order ('SO-2026-Alpha') and Account ('Alpha Industries') are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via a PHP script in setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected invoice subject ('INV-2026-Alpha'), shipping charge (50.00), and final grand total (2350.00) match both the explicit task instructions and the mathematical sum of the seeded line items (2300) plus the shipping fee. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
